curation.synopsis: Inquisitor Obodiah Roth and his retinue are dispatched to the Medina Corridor, a strategically vital cluster of worlds, to recover a set of ancient artefacts before they fall into the wrong hands. But Roth is not the only one hunting them: the Ironclads, a vast and merciless army of traitors, sweep through the subsector crushing all resistance in their search for the same prize. As assassination attempts mount and a terrible cataclysm looms over the Medina worlds, Roth comes to suspect that the deadliest danger may already be inside his own circle, for one of his trusted companions is a traitor. A tense blend of war and mystery that opens the Bastion Wars, pitting one Inquisitor's wits against an enemy that seems unstoppable.
